    S

    save(List, String) - Static method in class com.utils.CollectionFileManager
    Saves the list of music bands to the specified file path.
    Save() - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Saves the collection to the default file path.
    SaveCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for saving the collection to a file.

    Saves the collection to the default file path.

    ScriptInputStream - Class in com.utils
    Custom InputStream implementation that reads from a list of strings.
    ScriptInputStream(List) - Constructor for class com.utils.ScriptInputStream
    Constructs a new ScriptInputStream with the provided list of input lines.
    send(Request) - Method in class com.client.network.AsyncClient
    Sends a request to the server and waits for response.
    sendWithRetry(Request) - Method in class com.client.network.AsyncClient
    Attempts to send a request with automatic reconnection on failure.

    Converts a Serializable object to a byte array.

    Serializes an object and prepends a 4-byte length header.
